mapper.select:
SELECT ID, AGENT_NAME, INTRODUCTION, AVATAR, STATUS, API_KEY, AGENT_SORT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TYPE,AGENT_CODE FROM SYS_AGENT
TYPE = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY AGENT_SORT, ID

SELECT ID, AGENT_NAME, INTRODUCTION, AVATAR, STATUS, API_KEY, AGENT_SORT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TYPE,AGENT_CODE FROM SYS_AGENT WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_AGENT (ID, AGENT_NAME, INTRODUCTION, AVATAR, STATUS, API_KEY, AGENT_SORT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME,TYPE,AGENT_CODE) VALUES (#{id}, #{agentName}, #{introduction}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{apiKey}, #{agentSort}, #{createBy}, #{createByName}, #{createTime},#{type},#{agentCode})
